transcript: Speaker A: Hello. Speaker B: Hello. Speaker A: आता काय बोलायचं? [What to say now?] Speaker B: मला पण तसेच वाटते. [I feel the same way.] Speaker A: How are you, Neha? Speaker B: I am... छान आहे मी. [I am... I am fine.] Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल, "I am good". [Not like that, say "I am good".] Speaker B: I am good. Speaker C: MySivi app वर १ कोटी लोकं spoken English ची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]

summary: A girl struggles to speak English during a video call, highlighting her lack of confidence. The ad introduces the MySivi app as a solution to practice spoken English, showcasing its popularity and a trial offer for ₹1.
